title: Advisory Council on the Misuse of Drugs member biographies
body: "The Advisory Council on the Misuse of Drugs (ACMD) makes recommendations to government on the control of dangerous or otherwise harmful drugs, including classification and scheduling under the Misuse of Drugs Act 1971 and its regulations. It is an advisory non-departmental public body, sponsored by the Home Office.  This document provides more information about the current members of the ACMD.  "
